# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

---
Resources:
  iam-role-lambda:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
---
Resources:
  iam-role-lambda:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
---

Resources:
  iam-role-lambda:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com

---

Resources:
  iam-role-lambda:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com

---
Resources:
  iam-role-lambda:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
---

  role-policy-sqs:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - Ref: iam-role-lambda
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:*

          Resource: "*"
  role-policy-sns:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - Ref: iam-role-lambda
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:*

          Resource: "*"
---

Resources:
  role-policy-sns:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Roles:
      - 'Ref': iam-role-lambda
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
            Action:
            - sns:*
            Resource: '*'
---

  role-policy-s3:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - Ref: iam-role-lambda
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
            Action:
            - s3:*

            Resource: "*"

        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
            Action:
            - sqs:*

            Resource: "*"
---

  role-policy-sqs:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Roles:
      - Ref: iam-role-lambda

      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
            Action:
            - sqs:*

            Resource: "*"
